Interface LayoutEngine

public interface LayoutEngine
Pure layout: IR → coordinates. Deterministic, no DOM, no SVG string — that is the emitter's job (docs/DESIGN.md §4). The own font-metrics oracle feeds label/box sizing here in M1. M0: a trivial engine that produces an empty canvas; real per-type layout (pie arithmetic, xychart axis mapping, sequence grid) lands in M1.

    static LayoutEngine
    m0Default()
    The M0 default: empty diagrams lay out to a zero canvas.

      static LayoutEngine m0Default()
